neqsim.process.processmodel.dexpi.DexpiProcessUnit

Package
Description
neqsim.process.processmodel.dexpi
DEXPI integration layer for importing and exporting P&ID data.

    DexpiSimulationBuilder.buildUnitMap(Document document, DexpiTopologyResolver.ResolvedTopology topology)
    Builds a map of equipment ID to DexpiProcessUnit with sizing attributes populated.
